pref.pageSubtitle: How I prefer to work and collaborate
pref.ctaDescription: Want to discuss opportunities, expectations, or collaboration details?

items.1: Competitive and flexible expectations aligned with experience level, business impact, and market standards.
items.2: Open to full-time employment, contract, or freelance collaboration depending on company needs.
items.3: Comfortable taking ownership independently while delivering consistent value with minimal supervision.

items.1: Remote-first preference with strong experience collaborating effectively across distributed teams.
items.2: Hybrid opportunities are also welcome for the right role and culture fit.
items.3: Comfortable contributing as an individual expert, team member, project owner, or technical lead.

items.1: Open to opportunities in Hungary, across the European Union, or fully international remote teams.
items.2: Relocation within Europe can be considered for the right long-term opportunity.
items.3: Comfortable working across time zones and multicultural environments.

items.1: Interested in Frontend, Angular, Full Stack, Platform, Product Engineering, and Software Development roles.
items.2: Strong fit for dashboard platforms, internal tools, SaaS products, and enterprise applications.
items.3: Particularly motivated by ownership-driven roles in ambitious startups or fast-moving teams.

items.1: Strongest focus: Python, Java, Angular, TypeScript, JavaScript, responsive UI architecture, scalable frontend systems and Event-Driven architecture.
items.2: Additional experience with .NET/C#, SQL, REST/GraphQL APIs, backend integrations, Docker, Git, GitHub, GitLab, cloud-friendly architectures and Domain-Driven design (DDD).
items.3: Value clean architecture, testing, CI/CD, performance optimization, secure coding, and maintainable systems.

items.1: Thrive in transparent, respectful, and high-trust environments with clear communication.
items.2: Appreciate ownership culture, strong engineering standards, and pragmatic decision-making.
items.3: Prefer low-politics teams focused on execution, quality, and shared success.

items.2: Current transition time is short and flexible depending on agreement.
items.3: Able to start quickly, typically within one week.

items.1: Value flexible working arrangements and strong home office support.
items.2: Appreciate healthcare, growth opportunities, and continuous learning environments.
items.3: Most motivated by meaningful challenges, long-term stability, and room to grow.

1.title: English B2 Certification
1.desc: Earned my B2 English certification during the final year of primary school, establishing an early foundation in professional communication and international collaboration.

2.title: Berettyóújfalui Gróf Tisza István Hospital
2.desc: Completed university professional practice within the hospital IT department, supporting business systems, inventory platforms, medical software environments, user administration, backup operations, and infrastructure reliability. Gained hands-on experience in secure operations within a highly sensitive healthcare environment.

3.title: Avatao Innovative Learning Ltd
3.desc: Reviewed and improved cybersecurity training materials while fixing technical issues across multiple programming languages including C#, C++, Java, Ruby, JavaScript, Go, and Python. Ensured quality, technical accuracy, and professional standards across educational content.

4.title: University of Debrecen
4.desc: Successfully completed the BSc in Computer Science (Software Engineering), strengthening foundations in software development, algorithms, systems, and engineering practices.

5.title: University of Szeged
5.desc: Started MSc studies in Computer Science (Software Engineering), focusing on advanced software systems, modern technologies, and professional specialization.

6.title: ISO 27001 Auditor Certification
6.desc: Earned ISO 27001 Auditor certification, expanding expertise in information security governance, risk management, controls, and compliance frameworks.

7.role: Medior Cybersecurity Content Developer / Platform Engineer
7.title: Avatao Innovative Learning Ltd
7.desc: Promoted to medior role with ownership across development, mentoring, and platform improvement. Built cybersecurity tutorials and challenge systems in multiple technologies, reviewed pull requests, mentored developers, developed backend/frontend features, and led third-party platform integrations.

8.desc: Working independently on software projects including games, security-focused applications, anti-malware solutions, and modern web systems while continuing MSc studies.

9.desc: Expected completion of MSc in Computer Science (Software Engineering).

cashmira.title: Cashmira NetBank
cashmira.description: Designed and developed a modern digital banking platform featuring secure authentication, account administration, card controls, transaction management, and administrative workflows. Built with Angular, Node.js, and MongoDB, with focus on clean architecture, responsiveness, and secure financial-style operations.

hangman.title: Hangman++
hangman.description: Built a production-style terminal game project that demonstrates complete software lifecycle ownership from architecture and C++ development to testing, containerization, CI/CD pipelines, automated deployment, metrics exposure, and observability dashboards. Strong focus on engineering discipline and maintainability.

qme.title: Q'Me Quiz Platform
qme.description: Created an interactive quiz platform with authentication, leaderboards, personal statistics, difficulty systems, and user-submitted content. Included profanity filtering, data visualization, and scalable backend logic to encourage learning through engagement.

galaxy.title: Galaxy Dungeon
galaxy.description: Developed a fantasy-themed 2D dungeon crawler focused on exploration, combat, and player progression. Built core gameplay systems in Unity using C#, with scalable architecture prepared for map expansion, and boss mechanics.

pebble.title: Pebble Strategy Game
pebble.description: Implemented a strategy board game using JavaFX with MVC architecture, persistent XML save/load functionality, and tested business logic. Emphasized structured OOP design, maintainability, and clean separation of concerns.

vanta.title: Vanta Security Integration
vanta.description: Planned, designed, and independently implemented a full third-party Vanta integration to synchronize cybersecurity training completion data with external compliance systems. Developed secure OAuth flows, encrypted credential storage, background synchronization pipelines, admin management UI, retry logic, and stakeholder-ready solution presentation.

frontend.title: Frontend Platform Development
frontend.description: Developed major frontend platform features including role-based access control, organization analytics dashboards, team workflows, messaging systems, certificates, localization support, and responsive UI improvements. Focused heavily on maintainable architecture, clean UX, and scalable enterprise interfaces.

backend.title: Backend and API Engineering
backend.description: Designed and implemented backend APIs for analytics, user activity tracking, challenge completion statistics, and next-generation training systems. Worked in UseCase-driven architecture with strong validation, clean separation of concerns, and documented service contracts.

framework.title: Exercise Framework Engineering
framework.description: Enhanced the internal cybersecurity exercise framework by introducing configurable modules, optional runtime services, event-trigger systems, deployment health checks, improved validation rules, and modular architecture upgrades that accelerated content creation workflows.

mentorship.title: Mentorship and Technical Leadership
mentorship.description: Mentored international external developers, validated deliverables, reviewed implementations, provided technical guidance, and acted as a bridge between contributors and internal platform standards. Supported engineering quality through structured feedback and integration readiness reviews.

infra.title: Infrastructure and Resource Governance
infra.description: Improved resource allocation strategies for sandboxed training environments by tuning memory limits, introducing scalable multipliers, and balancing platform stability with performance requirements in orchestrated container environments.

protobuf.title: Protobuf Library Engineering
protobuf.description: Extended shared protocol buffer schemas and improved core identification structures to support cleaner entity relationships, better traceability, and consistent inter-service communication.

tags.terminalDevops: Advanced terminal game with DevOps lifecycle
